title: Command Relay
description: A simple mod that allows you to send a command to friends
body:
# Overview
A simple mod that allows you to send a command to friends.   
Command can be run as a player or server.  
Mod is not required on client to work.  
# Commands
You can either run `/relay <command>` or `/. <command>`
## Example
- `/relay say hello`
- `/. say hello`

## Output
![img.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/C4VyETAK/images/c8b8ebdbc96e9bb5fc424206f8e31268fbe0282d.png)
